description: Testing carousel title functionality including default display, valid/invalid input handling, and bad word filtering according to configuration

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check default display of title
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: place holder...
expected_result: Display correctly as designed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check SET NEW / EDIT/ DELETE title with valid data
+ Alphabetical and number characters
+ English characters
+ Half-width Japanese characters
+ Full-width Japanese characters
+ Another supported languages
+ Spaces characters
+ Supported special character, symbols: @#$%^🌷🐕🐱
+ Max length
+ Max length - 1
+ Min length
+ Min length + 1
expected_result:
+ Data is set successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Redundant spaces are auto-trimmed
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check setting title with invalid data
+ NULL
+ Min length - 1
+ Max length + 1
+ Unsupported languages
+ Unsupported special character, symbols
expected_result:
+ Display correct error message
+ Not update into DB

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check setting title with Bad words 
+ Input bad word which has been defined in config file before but  has been removed from Config file already
expected_result:
+ Data is set successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check setting title with Bad words 
+ Input bad word which has been already defined in config file 
+ Input bad word which has been updated  in config file 
+ Input bad word which has been new-added  in config file
expected_result: Check if Bad words are removed from title (Base on spec)

description: Testing image upload functionality including file sources, formats, dimensions, naming conventions, size limitations and validation of incorrect inputs

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Drag drop image / Click Upload button to upload image from
+ PC
+ Shared device: Mobile ...
+ USB, Facebook, Instagram..
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with below extension
+ .jpg, .jpeg, png, tiff, gif, ico, asf, svg
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when add new images with new extension
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with below types
+ all images are horizontal images 
+ all images are vertical images
+ both horizontal images and vertical images
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when add new images with different type
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with all kinds of name
+ Max value -1
+ Max value
+ Has special symbol: ".", "-", "_", "#"
+ Has English character (Upper and Lower char)
+ Includes SQL injection 
+ Includes HTML (Scripts)
+ Includes half-width characters
+ Includes full-width characters
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when add new images with different name
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with below size 
+ Max value
+ Max value -1 
+ Min value
+ Min value +1
+ Min ~ Max value
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when add new images with different size
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT/ DELETE uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with below height/width
+ Max value
+ Max value -1 
+ Min value
+ Min value +1
+ Min ~ Max value
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when add new images with different height/width
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT/ DELETE uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload number of images as below
+ Carousel has 1 image
+ Carousel has > 2 images
+ Carousel has max images
expected_result:
+ Can upload image successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly as setting
+ Carousel displays in published WEB/APP correctly when EDIT/ DELETE uploaded image

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload image with incorrect data
+ Incorrect size: + 0 KB, > Max size, < Min size
+ Incorrect height: > Max height, < Min height
+ Incorrect width: > Max width, < Min width
+ Incorrect extension: mp4, mov, txt, xls...
+ XLS file that has been changed extention from jpg file
+ JPG file that has been changed extention from xls file
+ Upload more than max quantity (ex: a carousel is permitted to set 5 images. => When testing, upload 6 images)
expected_result:
+ Show error message properly
+ Cannot upload image
+ Not update into DB

item_type: Set position for each image in carousel
description: Testing image positioning functionality in carousel including index settings for different quantities of images and handling inactive/draft images

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Setting index when
+ Carousel has 1 image
+ Carousel has > 2 images
+ Carousel has max images
expected_result: In published WEB/APP, position of image display correctly as index

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Setting index > max quantity
(ex: a carousel has 5 images. => When testing, set 6 index)
expected_result:
+ Display error message
+ Not update DB

test_view_points.viewpoint: Setting index for images that have been set as inactive/draft
expected_result: In published WEB/APP, inactive/draft image is not displayed

description: Testing carousel navigation, auto-movement functionality and link access permissions based on user status

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Next/Previous button
+ Click on Next button when current slide is first slide / middle slide / last slide

+ Click on Previous button when current slide is first slide / middle slide / last slide

+ Click continuously on Next button when current slide is first slide / middle slide / last slide

+ Click continuously on Previous button when current slide is first slide / middle slide / last slide
expected_result: Go to correct slide [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
○○○○○○　button under carousel
+ Click on first ○／middle ○／last ○
+ Double click on first ○／middle ○／last ○
expected_result: Go to correct slide [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
○○○○○○　button under carousel
+ Click on current ○
expected_result: Carousel keep unchanged

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Auto-move slide
+ Do not have any action on page
+ After click Next/Previous button
+ After double click Next/Previous button
+ After click ○ button
expected_result: Go to correct slide [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Click/ Double click on link setting in title / image in carousel

Condition: 
+ Link is permitted to access with customer user
+ User status: log-out
expected_result: Can open link successfully with the same tab / not the same tab [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Click/ Double click on link setting in title / image in carousel

Condition: 
+ Link is permitted to access with customer user
+ User status: log-in
expected_result: Can open link successfully with the same tab / not the same tab [base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Click/ Double click on link setting in title / image in carousel

Condition: 
+ Link is not permitted to access with customer user
+ User status: log-out
expected_result:
Can not open link
Open proper page (Ex: login page. After login, will open that link)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Click/ Double click on link setting in title / image in carousel

Condition: 
+ Link is not permitted to access with customer user
+ User status: log-in
expected_result: Can open link successfully with the same tab / not the same tab [base on requirement]
